reasoning: Bodo/Glimt has made a miraculous run to the Round of 16 of the 2025-26 Champions League by defeating Manchester City, Atletico Madrid, and Inter Milan. While their run has been historic, and their current form is outstanding, they still must advance past four rounds (Sporting Lisbon, a true title contender in QF, another in SF, and another in the Final). A 2% implied probability accurately captures both the Polymarket price (0.02 on Feb 19) and their status as a major underdog who has already shown they can knock out elite giants but still face a brutal gauntlet against the best teams in Europe. Given historical base rates for non-Top 5 league teams winning the UCL (0 since 2004), 0.02 represents an appropriately calibrated estimate for an underdog run of this caliber.
